# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- Python tutorial: Errors and Exceptions: https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/errors.html
- Python built-in exceptions: https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html
- Python contextlib: https://docs.python.org/3/library/contextlib.html
- Python logging: https://docs.python.org/3/library/logging.html
- Python warnings: https://docs.python.org/3/library/warnings.html
